title: Fetch API
description: Retrieve JSON data from a network API using the global fetch function within a useEffect hook.
problemStatement:
Mobile data! Use the `fetch` API inside `useEffect` to get data from `"https://api.example.com/movies"` and store the result in a state called `movies`.

**Requirement:** Use an empty dependency array to fetch only once on mount.
hints: React Native supports the standard web `fetch` API out of the box.
expectedOutput: State updated with API results (logic verified in code)
